title: RetailDaddy Live SaaS Demo
opening: Hello, I am the RetailDaddy AI demo assistant. I will walk through the product, show the important workflows on screen, and answer questions as they come up.
closing: That completes the core RetailDaddy walkthrough. I can now revisit any feature, answer implementation questions, or go deeper on workflows that matter to your team.

steps.title: Operations dashboard
steps.say: We will start with the operations dashboard. This view gives owners and managers a quick read on sales, stock health, pending orders, and alerts that need attention.

steps.title: Inventory tracking
steps.say: Inventory tracking helps store teams monitor SKU availability, spot low stock, and understand where stock movement is happening before it becomes an operational issue.

steps.title: Order management
steps.say: The order management view is built to reduce manual follow-up. Teams can see order status, fulfillment exceptions, payment state, and returns from one workflow.

steps.title: Product catalog
steps.say: The catalog keeps product data organized so teams can manage pricing, product details, categories, and SKU-level information from a single place.

steps.title: Reports and performance
steps.say: Reports help operators compare store performance, identify fast-moving products, review margins, and make decisions using current operational data.

steps.title: Integrations and setup
steps.say: For implementation, this area is where the demo should show how RetailDaddy connects with existing systems and how teams configure the operating workflow.
